headline: Looking for an Investment Uncorrelated With War or Oil? Consider These Spinoffs.
summary: Spinoffs can fit that bill.  Trivariate Research founder Adam Parker published his “Spinoff Playbook” on Tuesday, providing context on the performance of stocks that start a new life away from their parent company.  After the deal is done, spinoffs generally outperform the parents, but it can take about six months for things to start improving.

headline: Thursday's big stock stories: What’s likely to move the market in the next trading session
summary: Both the S&P 500 and the Nasdaq ended Wednesday at record levels, buoyed by the extension of a U.S.-Iran ceasefire and upbeat earnings reports.

headline: HONEYWELL ANNOUNCES QUANTINUUM'S CONFIDENTIAL SUBMISSION OF DRAFT REGISTRATION STATEMENT FOR PROPOSED INITIAL PUBLIC OFFERING
summary: Honeywell (Nasdaq: HON) today announced that Quantinuum LLC ("Quantinuum" or the "Company"), which is majority owned by Honeywell, confidentially submitted a draft registration statement on Form S-1 to the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (the "SEC") on February 17, 2026, relating to the proposed initial public offering of Quantinuum's common stock. headline: Is It Too Late To Consider Honeywell International (HON) After Recent Share Price Gains?
summary: Investors may be wondering if Honeywell International, at a last close of US$222.22, still offers value or if most of the easy gains are already on the table. The stock has seen a 4.7% decline over the last 7 days, is roughly flat over the past month with a 0.3% return, and is up 13.4% year to date and 21.4% over the last year. Recent coverage has focused on Honeywell International’s positioning as a diversified industrial and technology company, which has kept the stock in focus for...
